steps: Go to https://app.tomorrow.io/signup and create a free account
Once logged in, navigate to Development > API Keys at https://app.tomorrow.io/development/keys
Your default API key is displayed — click to copy it
Optionally click 'Add Key' to create additional named API keys

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Tomorrow.io API key, passed as a query parameter named 'apikey' in each request

notes: Free tier available with 500 calls/day and 25 calls/hour
The API key is passed as a query parameter (?apikey=YOUR_KEY), not an HTTP header
Paid plans unlock higher rate limits and additional data fields such as historical weather
Supports coordinates (lat,lon), city names, and zip codes as location input

test_endpoint.description: Get real-time weather for New York — replace {apikey} with your actual key
